title: lupinus sulphureus var. bingenensis
intro: Lupinus sulphureus var. bingenensis, also known as Bingen yellow lupine, is a variety of the yellow lupine plant, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Lupinus sulphureus var. bingenensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
